releaseNotes: Important fixes: Movies/TV Shows/Live TV no longer crash on real accounts with unusual provider data, channels and movies load much faster (the EPG guide now loads in the background instead of blocking everything else), and buffering should be much smoother (quality now adapts to your connection automatically instead of always forcing the highest bitrate). Also fixed Settings/Search being hidden on the home screen, Guide text overlapping, and a stuck update-installer banner. Verified in release-build testing: Movies, TV Shows, and Live TV all load and play correctly with no crashes.
